items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG2206MP, Omada:A network switch is a functional network unit connecting individual devices or other network elements. It is designed for managing network traffic. The TP-Link SG2206MP, Omada SDN is made to be placed on the desk or wall. The model impresses with a switching capacity of 12 Gb/s. The Switch features 5 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. One SFP connector serves to transport data via optical fibers. 10/100/1000Base-T technology allows data transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. It uses Dual Personality ports, notable for including  both the RJ-45 and SFP connector ; however, only one of them can be active at a time.  The switch dimensions are 158 × 100.7 × 25.4mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology makes sure the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also enables you to control end station priority. The TP-Link device works with PoE technology that provides power and signal connection to end devices with a single LAN cable. The switch weighs 490g. Key Features of the...

Az ezüstöt diszkrét megjelenés jellemzi, ezért szinte minden ruhádhoz illik. A nyaklánc lenyűgöző ragyogásáról csiszolással gondoskodtak. Thanks to the combination of high magnification and large lenses, it can capture a large amount of light and provide a clear image even in low light conditions, such as twilight or night sky viewing. The construction with Porro prisms also ensures natural image rendering and good depth of space. The optics use high-quality BaK-4 glass with multiple anti-reflective layers that increase light transmission and improve the contrast of the observed image. The robust aluminium alloy body with rubberised surface provides good impact protection while ensuring a secure grip even in challenging conditions. The Levenhuk Bruno Base 15x70 binoculars are also IPX3 splash-proof and can be easily mounted on a tripod for stable viewing. items.raw_desc: Powerline adapter devolo Magic 2 LAN triple:The powerline is the ideal way to connect to the internet without a WiFi signal. The device uses regular electricity to form a connection to the internet, so one need simply connect the adaptor to a wall outlet, and it forms a LAN connection without the need to drill any holes in the wall. The devolo Magic 2 LAN Triple has an impressive length, giving you a reach of up to 500 m. Of course, the transfer speed largely depends on the stability of your connection, but with this model it's known to be around 2400 Mb/s. Each pack has 2 × adaptéru. The secondary unit of the DEVOLO powerline is armed with three LAN connectors. One useful advantage is that the adaptors on this model are designed with a through-socket. You will thus still be able to connect other electronics. You'll be well aware of the status of your network, thanks to the signalling diodes.
